name: Brown Rice Royal
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Finely chopped green onions (including tops)
3 cups Cooked brown rice (cooked in beef broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced fresh mushrooms and cook until they are tender.
3. Stir in the finely chopped green onions (with the tops) and continue cooking for about 5 minutes, or until everything is well combined.
4. Remove the pan from the heat.
5. Stir in the cooked brown rice until evenly distributed.
Each serving provides:
119 calories
2.7 g. protein
2.7 g. fat
20.8 g. carbohydrate
292 mg. sodium
0 mg. cholesterol
Source: Brown Rice
